title: Understand: biodiversity and ecosystem health
description: Check your understanding of biodiversity and ecosystem health in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes biodiversity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the variety of species in an ecosystem
the variety of living and nonliving things in an ecosystem
the number of predators in an ecosystem

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Biodiversity describes the \_\_\_\_\_\_ in an ecosystem.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: variety of living and nonliving things

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about biodiversity is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Biodiversity describes the variety of species in an ecosystem.
Biodiversity describes the variety of living and nonliving things in an ecosystem.
Biodiversity describes the number of predators in an ecosystem.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>When a species goes extinct, biodiversity in its ecosystem \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Extinction causes  \_\_\_\_\_\_ in biodiversity.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>Biodiversity in an ecosystem \_\_\_\_\_\_ when species go extinct.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these human activities is most likely to decrease biodiversity in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: expanding a city into a natural habitat
creating a park to protect an area of wilderness

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these human activities is most likely to increase biodiversity in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: hunting and killing a large number of animals
mining a mountainside for natural resources

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these human activities will most likely maintain an ecosystem’s biodiversity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: creating a park to protect an area of wilderness
catching a large number of fish along a coast
building a town in an area of natural habitat

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>Ecosystems that have lost biodiversity are typically \_\_\_\_\_\_ healthy.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**What typically happens to ecosystems that lose biodiversity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>When an ecosystem loses biodiversity, it typically becomes \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]
